brief: ALGOPOLIS game audio: procedural Web Audio SFX + ambient pad + mute, deploy & verify

goals.title: SFX engine
goals.objective: Procedural Web Audio SFX (click/build/research/run/event/victory/collapse) + gesture-started AudioContext + mute toggle in header, no external assets
goals.evidence: Web Audio SFX engine added: AUDIO ctx + blip()/snd() with 9 cues (click/select/build/research/run/event/victory/collapse/error); gesture-started+resumed AudioContext on first pointerdown; mute toggle #muteBtn (localStorage algopolis_muted); snd() hooked into onBtn/placeZone/researchTech/runCycle/showEvent/endGame/flash. node --check SYNTAX OK.

goals.title: Ambient pad
goals.objective: Generative low-volume ambient音 (oscillator drone/arpeggio) tied to mute, starts on first gesture
goals.evidence: Ambient pad startPad(): low-volume drone (2 detuned sines through LFO-modulated lowpass) + interval arpeggio (pentatonic, blip vol .05), routed via AUDIO.master so mute-gated; auto-starts on first pointerdown gesture (typeof-guarded call). node --check SYNTAX OK.

goals.title: Verify & deploy
goals.objective: puppeteer confirms AudioContext starts + SFX callable + mute works with no errors; repackage, deploy to Higgsfield, live render check, push GitHub
